evidence_summary: ABC Northern Tasmania reported that Sharmaine Mansfield hosted live paranormal investigations at the Gaiety Theatre in Zeehan. Mansfield said that at the Gaiety Theatre many viewers picked up on a presence of a young girl named Ava, apparently a caretaker's daughter from many years ago, and were seeing the vision of this little girl.
